description_long: This object is a rugged, industrial-style projector with a cylindrical yellow metal housing and a prominent black lens at the front. The body features several warning labels and hazard symbols, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty or outdoor use. Two articulated black metal arms extend from the sides, likely for stabilization or mounting, and orange cables run along the exterior, connecting various components. The rear section is composed of a ribbed, dark material, possibly for heat dissipation, and includes a blue accent panel. The surface shows signs of wear and weathering, indicating it is built for durability in urban environments. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical parts and a robust construction.
description: A heavy-duty yellow industrial projector with a cylindrical body, black lens, articulated metal arms, and visible orange cables, designed for rugged urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black lens opening, yellow cylindrical housing, and the tips of the articulated arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow metal body, blue accent panel, warning labels, and the full length of the articulated arms and orange cables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed dark section, blue accent, and the attachment points of the arms and cables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with visible warning labels, blue panel, and the articulated arms in a different orientation.
attribute_lens_type: fixed; large circular lens at the front, no visible adjustment rings
attribute_control_panel_design: No clear control panel is visible; possible small buttons or dials on the side near the blue accent.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ribbed section at the rear likely serves as ventilation; no distinct grills or mesh visible.
